Mohammed Al-Owais.bio: Saudi Arabia's number one goalkeeper and a key figure at Al-Hilal. His 60 caps make him one of the most experienced players in the squad, and he was the starting keeper at the 2022 World Cup.
Mohammed Al-Owais.playingStyle: Commanding goalkeeper with excellent shot-stopping, strong reflexes, and confident handling of crosses
Mohammed Al-Owais.worldCup2026Role: Undisputed starting goalkeeper and one of the team's most important players
Mohammed Al-Owais.notableFact: Was the goalkeeper for Saudi Arabia's historic 2-1 victory over Argentina at the 2022 World Cup, one of the greatest upsets in tournament history

Sultan Al-Ghannam.bio: Experienced right-back from Al-Nassr who has been a regular in the Saudi setup for years. His 55 caps and partnership with some of the Saudi Pro League's biggest stars make him a reliable presence.
Sultan Al-Ghannam.playingStyle: Attacking full-back who provides width and overlapping runs, with solid defensive fundamentals
Sultan Al-Ghannam.worldCup2026Role: Experienced backup right-back competing with Saud Abdulhamid for the starting position
Sultan Al-Ghannam.notableFact: Has played alongside Cristiano Ronaldo at Al-Nassr, gaining experience from training with one of the greatest players ever

Abdullah Madu.bio: Reliable center-back from Al-Nassr who forms part of the experienced core of Saudi Arabia's defense. A steady, no-nonsense defender with 50 caps to his name.
Abdullah Madu.playingStyle: Strong, physical center-back who excels in aerial duels and positional defending
Abdullah Madu.worldCup2026Role: Experienced center-back option providing defensive solidity and depth
Abdullah Madu.notableFact: Has been part of multiple Al-Nassr title-winning squads in the Saudi Pro League

Abdulelah Al-Amri.bio: Rising star of Saudi Arabian football, this Al-Nassr center-back is one of the most valuable defenders in the squad. At 29, he is entering his prime years as a defender.
Abdulelah Al-Amri.playingStyle: Modern center-back combining physical presence with the ability to play out from the back and carry the ball
Abdulelah Al-Amri.worldCup2026Role: Starting center-back and one of the defensive cornerstones of the team
Abdulelah Al-Amri.notableFact: One of the highest-valued Saudi players, reflecting his status as a top defender in Asia

Ali Al-Bulaihi.bio: Veteran Al-Hilal center-back with 60 caps who has been a fixture in Saudi Arabia's defense for years. Known for his passionate commitment and fiery temperament on the pitch.
Ali Al-Bulaihi.playingStyle: Aggressive, commanding defender who leads by example with his intensity and willingness to put his body on the line
Ali Al-Bulaihi.worldCup2026Role: Experienced defensive option whose passion and experience are valuable in high-pressure tournament situations
Ali Al-Bulaihi.notableFact: Known for his theatrical celebrations and emotional displays, he has become one of the most recognizable Saudi players

Salman Al-Faraj.bio: Saudi Arabia's captain and midfield general, this Al-Hilal legend has 80 caps and is one of the most decorated players in Saudi football history. He is the heartbeat of the team.
Salman Al-Faraj.playingStyle: Elegant, left-footed midfielder with superb passing range, vision, and the ability to dictate the tempo of matches
Salman Al-Faraj.worldCup2026Role: Captain and starting central midfielder who controls the game's rhythm and leads by example
Salman Al-Faraj.notableFact: Captained Saudi Arabia during the famous 2-1 win over Argentina at the 2022 World Cup in Qatar

Abdulrahman Al-Aboud.bio: Pacy right winger from Al-Ittihad who adds speed and directness to Saudi Arabia's attack. A relatively new addition to the national team with 12 caps.
Abdulrahman Al-Aboud.playingStyle: Fast, direct winger who beats defenders with pace and delivers dangerous crosses into the box
Abdulrahman Al-Aboud.worldCup2026Role: Squad rotation option on the right wing, capable of stretching defenses with his speed
Abdulrahman Al-Aboud.notableFact: Made his breakthrough at Al-Ittihad playing alongside Karim Benzema in the Saudi Pro League

Abdulrahman Ghareeb.bio: Skillful left winger from Al-Ahli who is one of the most exciting attacking talents in the Saudi Pro League. His technical ability and flair make him a dangerous threat.
Abdulrahman Ghareeb.playingStyle: Tricky winger with excellent close control, quick feet, and the ability to create something out of nothing
Abdulrahman Ghareeb.worldCup2026Role: Attacking option on the left wing, providing flair and creativity in the final third
Abdulrahman Ghareeb.notableFact: Has played alongside some of the biggest international stars brought to the Saudi Pro League in recent years

Firas Al-Buraikan.bio: One of Saudi Arabia's brightest young strikers, the Al-Nassr forward has 10 goals in 25 caps. At 26, he is entering his peak years as the spearhead of the national team attack.
Firas Al-Buraikan.playingStyle: Clinical finisher with good pace, intelligent movement, and the ability to score all types of goals
Firas Al-Buraikan.worldCup2026Role: Starting striker and primary goal threat, expected to lead the line at the World Cup
Firas Al-Buraikan.notableFact: Has trained alongside Cristiano Ronaldo at Al-Nassr, learning from one of the greatest goalscorers in history

Salem Al-Dawsari.bio: Saudi Arabia's talisman and one of the most celebrated players in the country's football history. The Al-Hilal star has 20 goals in 75 caps and is the team's most dangerous attacker.
Salem Al-Dawsari.playingStyle: Explosive left winger with devastating pace, exceptional dribbling, and a thunderous left-footed shot
Salem Al-Dawsari.worldCup2026Role: Key attacking player and match-winner, Saudi Arabia's most important creative outlet
Salem Al-Dawsari.notableFact: Scored the iconic winning goal against Argentina at the 2022 World Cup, a stunning curling strike that became one of the tournament's most memorable moments

Hatan Bahbri.bio: Experienced right winger from Al-Shabab with 45 caps and 5 goals. A reliable squad player who has served the national team loyally across multiple qualifying campaigns.
Hatan Bahbri.playingStyle: Intelligent wide player who drifts inside to find pockets of space and combines well with teammates
Hatan Bahbri.worldCup2026Role: Experienced attacking option who can play across the front line and provide tactical flexibility
Hatan Bahbri.notableFact: One of the few players in the squad who has experience at two World Cups (2018 and 2022)

Fawaz Al-Qarni.bio: Experienced backup goalkeeper from Al-Shabab who has patiently waited for his chances with the national team. His 15 caps demonstrate he is a trusted reserve option.
Fawaz Al-Qarni.playingStyle: Tall, commanding goalkeeper with good shot-stopping ability and strong distribution
Fawaz Al-Qarni.worldCup2026Role: Second-choice goalkeeper providing reliable backup to Mohammed Al-Owais
Fawaz Al-Qarni.notableFact: Has been a consistent performer in the Saudi Pro League for over a decade

Yasser Al-Shahrani.bio: One of Saudi Arabia's most important players, the Al-Hilal left-back has 75 caps and is considered among the best full-backs in Asian football history. His energy and attacking contributions are vital.
Yasser Al-Shahrani.playingStyle: Dynamic, attack-minded left-back with relentless energy, pace, and excellent crossing ability
Yasser Al-Shahrani.worldCup2026Role: Starting left-back whose attacking contributions add an extra dimension to Saudi Arabia's play
Yasser Al-Shahrani.notableFact: Suffered a serious injury during the 2022 World Cup match against Argentina but fought back to full fitness

Abdullah Otayf.bio: Experienced Al-Hilal midfielder with 50 caps who provides reliable service in the center of the park. A steady, dependable presence who rarely lets the team down.
Abdullah Otayf.playingStyle: Composed central midfielder who recycles possession efficiently and provides balance in the middle
Abdullah Otayf.worldCup2026Role: Experienced midfield option providing depth and tactical versatility
Abdullah Otayf.notableFact: Has won numerous Saudi Pro League titles with Al-Hilal, one of Asia's most successful clubs

Nasser Al-Dawsari.bio: Young Al-Hilal midfielder who is part of the next generation of Saudi talent. His technical ability and energy have earned him 20 caps at just 27 years old.
Nasser Al-Dawsari.playingStyle: Dynamic, ball-carrying midfielder who drives forward with power and links defense to attack
Nasser Al-Dawsari.worldCup2026Role: Midfield option who adds energy and forward thrust from central positions
Nasser Al-Dawsari.notableFact: Despite sharing the surname with Salem Al-Dawsari, the two are not related but both represent Al-Hilal

Saud Abdulhamid.bio: The most valuable Saudi player in the squad, this right-back made history by joining Roma in Serie A, becoming one of the first Saudis to play in a top-five European league.
Saud Abdulhamid.playingStyle: Modern, attack-minded full-back with pace, excellent crossing, and the tactical sophistication gained from European football
Saud Abdulhamid.worldCup2026Role: Starting right-back and the team's most high-profile player, bringing European experience to the squad
Saud Abdulhamid.notableFact: Made history as one of the first Saudi players to play in Serie A, paving the way for future Saudi exports to European leagues

Hassan Al-Tambakti.bio: Young and talented center-back from Al-Shabab who is part of Saudi Arabia's defensive future. His composure and technical ability mark him out as a modern defender.
Hassan Al-Tambakti.playingStyle: Ball-playing center-back who is comfortable under pressure and can initiate attacks from deep positions
Hassan Al-Tambakti.worldCup2026Role: Starting center-back partner for Al-Amri, forming a young and athletic defensive pairing
Hassan Al-Tambakti.notableFact: Was part of the Saudi squad at the 2022 World Cup in Qatar, gaining invaluable tournament experience

Nawaf Al-Abed.bio: Veteran attacking midfielder from Al-Shabab with 60 caps and 8 goals. One of the most technically gifted Saudi players of his generation, known for spectacular goals.
Nawaf Al-Abed.playingStyle: Creative playmaker with sublime technical skill, vision, and the ability to produce moments of magic
Nawaf Al-Abed.worldCup2026Role: Experienced creative option off the bench, capable of unlocking tight defenses with his quality
Nawaf Al-Abed.notableFact: Famous for scoring a stunning long-range goal as a teenager, which went viral and announced his arrival on the football scene

Haitham Asiri.bio: Exciting young winger from Al-Ahli who represents the new wave of Saudi attacking talent. At 25, his pace and directness make him a dangerous threat.
Haitham Asiri.playingStyle: Explosive winger with blistering pace, quick feet, and the confidence to take on defenders one-on-one
Haitham Asiri.worldCup2026Role: Impact substitute whose speed can cause problems for tiring defenders in the second half
Haitham Asiri.notableFact: Part of the exciting young generation of Saudi players developed in the enhanced Saudi Pro League era

Abdulrahman Al-Obaid.bio: Young center-back from Al-Shabab who adds depth to Saudi Arabia's defensive options. A physical defender who has shown consistent improvement in recent seasons.
Abdulrahman Al-Obaid.playingStyle: Strong, physical defender who competes well in duels and provides reliable backup in the center of defense
Abdulrahman Al-Obaid.worldCup2026Role: Defensive squad depth, capable of stepping in when needed at center-back
Abdulrahman Al-Obaid.notableFact: Has been part of Al-Shabab's competitive squad in the increasingly strong Saudi Pro League

Mohammed Al-Rubaie.bio: Young goalkeeper from Al-Ahli who is part of Saudi Arabia's goalkeeping depth. With 5 caps, he is still building his international experience but shows strong potential.
Mohammed Al-Rubaie.playingStyle: Athletic, agile goalkeeper with sharp reflexes and improving command of his area
Mohammed Al-Rubaie.worldCup2026Role: Third-choice goalkeeper gaining experience and development from the World Cup environment
Mohammed Al-Rubaie.notableFact: Represents the future of Saudi goalkeeping alongside the established Al-Owais

Mohammed Kanno.bio: Powerful Al-Hilal midfielder with 55 caps and 4 goals who is one of the most important players in the Saudi midfield. His physical presence and engine make him indispensable.
Mohammed Kanno.playingStyle: Box-to-box powerhouse with tremendous stamina, strong tackling, and the ability to cover every blade of grass
Mohammed Kanno.worldCup2026Role: Starting central midfielder whose energy and physicality are crucial to Saudi Arabia's midfield dominance
Mohammed Kanno.notableFact: His tireless performance against Argentina at the 2022 World Cup was key to Saudi Arabia's historic victory

Ayman Yahya.bio: Exciting young striker from Al-Nassr who is the future of Saudi Arabian attacking football. At just 24, he has already shown a lethal instinct with 3 goals in 10 caps.
Ayman Yahya.playingStyle: Quick, intelligent striker with sharp movement, clinical finishing, and the ability to play between the lines
Ayman Yahya.worldCup2026Role: Exciting young forward option who can come off the bench and change the game with his energy and goals
Ayman Yahya.notableFact: Has emerged as a potential star despite the intense competition for places at Al-Nassr

Ali Lajami.bio: Young center-back from Al-Ahli who provides additional defensive options. His tall frame and physical attributes make him well-suited to international football.
Ali Lajami.playingStyle: Imposing central defender who uses his height and strength to dominate aerial duels and defend set pieces
Ali Lajami.worldCup2026Role: Defensive depth player who is particularly useful for defending set pieces and seeing out leads
Ali Lajami.notableFact: At 188cm, he is one of the tallest players in the Saudi squad, giving them an aerial advantage

Khalid Al-Ghannam.bio: Young right winger from Al-Nassr who is one of the most exciting prospects in Saudi football. At 24, his speed and skill make him a potential breakout star at the World Cup.
Khalid Al-Ghannam.playingStyle: Lightning-fast winger with exceptional pace, skillful dribbling, and an improving end product
Khalid Al-Ghannam.worldCup2026Role: Young attacking wildcard who can be unleashed against tiring defenses as a game-changing substitute
Khalid Al-Ghannam.notableFact: Brother of Sultan Al-Ghannam, the two have represented Saudi Arabia together in one of the national team's family connections

Musab Al-Juwayr.bio: The youngest player in the Saudi squad, this Al-Hilal striker represents the future of Saudi Arabian football. At just 22, his inclusion signals the federation's faith in youth development.
Musab Al-Juwayr.playingStyle: Energetic young striker with good movement, a strong work ethic, and an eye for goal
Musab Al-Juwayr.worldCup2026Role: Young developmental player whose World Cup inclusion is an investment in Saudi Arabia's football future
Musab Al-Juwayr.notableFact: The youngest member of the squad, he has the potential to be a star for Saudi Arabia for years to come
